about.title: Developer passionate about creating exceptional experiences
about.intro: I'm Adrián Escribano Pérez, Full Stack developer specialized in React, Next.js, Node.js and TypeScript.
about.approachItem1: Thoroughly understand requirements before writing a line of code
about.approachItem2: Design scalable and maintainable architectures from day one
about.approachItem3: Clean code, no unnecessary comments, easy to iterate
about.approachItem4: Exhaustive testing and clear communication with the team
about.tl2021Desc: First steps with HTML, CSS and JavaScript. Personal projects and self-taught learning.
about.tl2022Desc: Deep dive into React and Node.js. Professional internships in system administration.
about.tl2023Desc: Mastery of the full MERN stack. Multiple production projects with modern architectures.
about.tl2024Desc: Complete web platform development in a professional environment. Next.js, TypeScript and scalable architectures.
about.tl2025Desc: Joined the 42 Madrid cursus to deepen systems, algorithms and C/C++.
about.introFull: I'm Adrián Escribano Pérez, a Full Stack developer with over 3 years of experience building modern, scalable and intuitive web applications.
about.storyP1: My journey in software development started with curiosity and ended in obsession. From my first lines of HTML to complete architectures with Node.js and PostgreSQL, each project has taught me that good software is the one that disappears: the user only sees a seamless experience.
about.storyP2: I firmly believe in combining robust backend engineering with a frontend that delights. It's not enough for it to work: it has to feel right.
about.storyP3: I'm currently expanding my foundations at 42 Madrid, where peer learning and C/C++ projects give me a deeper perspective on how software actually works at a low level.
